source_title: CA FAIR Plan Rate Increase 2026: What Homeowners Must Know
subject: A European angle on your CA FAIR Plan Rate Increase 2026: What Homeowners Must Know piece
body:
Hi Mariah,

Your breakdown of the CA FAIR Plan rate increases was genuinely useful — the way you walked through what the changes mean for everyday homeowners, not just the policy mechanics, made a complicated subject feel approachable and real.

My Villa builds Italian-designed homes in Los Angeles using reinforced exposed concrete (cemento a vista), a construction method long favored across the Mediterranean for its resilience and longevity. Given how much insurability now hinges on structural integrity and fire resistance, that building tradition feels increasingly relevant to conversations like the one you started.

Would you be open to receiving more background on the project, or a brief call with our founder Paolo Mezzalama? No pressure either way — happy to share materials first if that's easier.

Best,
Lisa Monelli
My Villa Media Team
info@myvilla.la · myvilla.la
